name: Smart Email Routing Agent - High Priority / Billing / Promotional

nodes.name: New Mail
nodes.notes: Polls Outlook inbox for new mail.

nodes.name: Classify Email

categories.description: Urgent or time-sensitive: outages, escalations, angry customers, deadlines today, requests from executives/VIPs - anything needing an immediate response
Invoices, payment confirmations, subscription renewals, refunds, account charges, billing disputes
Marketing emails, newsletters, discounts, sales, cold outreach, ads

nodes.notes: Inspired by n8n community template #2851 (eCommerce department routing via Text Classifier). One node, N branches - do not use Agent+Switch for this.

nodes.name: Draft Reply Text
nodes.notes: One-shot draft generation - Basic LLM Chain, not a full Agent (no tools/memory needed here).

nodes.name: Create Draft Reply
nodes.notes: Creates a DRAFT (does not send). "from" field path assumes simplified trigger output - verify against your actual trigger output shape and adjust the expression if needed.

nodes.name: Move to Billing Folder
nodes.notes: Pick your real Billing folder in the Folder dropdown once credential is connected - left blank in this template.

nodes.name: Tag as Promotional
nodes.notes: Assigns the Outlook category "Promotional" to the message (create this category once in Outlook if it doesn't already exist).

parameters.content:
## Smart Classification Agent (Routing Architecture)

Uses the Text Classifier node to precisely route incoming mail into 3 branches: High Priority / Billing / Promotional.

Inspired by n8n community template #2851 (eCommerce department routing) - adapted here to inbox triage, using Microsoft Outlook + Azure OpenAI (gpt-5-mini).

Follow-up action per branch:
- High Priority: auto-drafted acknowledgement reply (LLM-drafted, saved as Draft, not sent)
- Billing: auto-filed to a designated folder (move to folder)
- Promotional: auto-tagged (category)

## "Other" branch (4th output, intentionally unconnected)

options.fallback = "other" means anything not matching the 3 categories lands here instead of silently dropping. No action wired - email stays in inbox untouched.

## Setup checklist

1. "Move to Billing Folder" - pick your real Billing folder (left blank)
2. "Tag as Promotional" - create an Outlook category named "Promotional" if you don't have one
3. "Create Draft Reply" - verify the sender-address expression matches your trigger's output shape
4. Test each branch with a sample email matching each category
